problems.title: Purchased-metal emissions
problems.description: Purchased-metal emissions matters for Northforge Components Ltd because identify where to focus carbon-reduction activity.
problems.spectrumRationale: Suggested as Mid Green because the problem appears to require organisational redesign or cross-system coordination.
problems.cynefinRationale: Suggested as Complex because it involves interacting actors, behaviours or relationships where outcomes may emerge over time.

scoreTrace.formula: weighted positive factors minus effort penalty, divided by five

contributions.explanation: Impact is very high and carries weight 20.
Strategic is very high and carries weight 15.
Leverage is very high and carries weight 15.
Urgency is high and carries weight 10.
Influence is moderate and carries weight 10.
Readiness is moderate and carries weight 10.
Confidence is low and carries weight 10.
Stakeholder is high and carries weight 5.
Learning is moderate and carries weight 5.
Effort is high and is treated as a delivery penalty.

problems.title: Supply-chain traceability
problems.description: Supply-chain traceability matters for LumaThread Apparel because improve traceability and reduce environmental and labour risk.
problems.spectrumRationale: Suggested as Mid Green because the problem appears to require organisational redesign or cross-system coordination.
problems.cynefinRationale: Suggested as Confused because evidence confidence is low and the problem needs clarification.

scoreTrace.formula: weighted positive factors minus effort penalty, divided by five

contributions.explanation: Impact is very high and carries weight 20.
Strategic is very high and carries weight 15.
Leverage is very high and carries weight 15.
Urgency is very high and carries weight 10.
Influence is moderate and carries weight 10.
Readiness is low and carries weight 10.
Confidence is low and carries weight 10.
Stakeholder is very high and carries weight 5.
Learning is moderate and carries weight 5.
Effort is high and is treated as a delivery penalty.

pathways.problemDefinition: Financed emissions evidence matters for Evergreen Bank because integrate sustainability into lending decisions.

interventionOptions.title: Pilot a decision prompt in SME loan review.
interventionOptions.description: A sustainability decision prompt during SME loan review improves climate-risk consideration without unfair exclusion.
interventionOptions.mechanism: Test the riskiest assumption in a contained setting.

experiment.title: Climate-risk integration
experiment.hypothesis: A sustainability decision prompt during SME loan review improves climate-risk consideration without unfair exclusion.
experiment.method: Pilot a decision prompt in SME loan review.
experiment.decisionThreshold: Improved sustainability evidence with no adverse fairness pattern

pathways.title: Anaesthetic gases

pathways.decisionRationale: A bounded prototype reduces uncertainty before wider implementation.

interventionOptions.title: Provide clinicians with anaesthetic-impact feedback in one theatre group.
interventionOptions.description: Anaesthetic-impact feedback will reduce high-impact gas use without affecting patient outcomes.
interventionOptions.mechanism: Test the riskiest assumption in a contained setting.

experiment.title: Anaesthetic gases

experiment.decisionThreshold: Reduced high-impact gas use with no patient safety issue

problems.spectrumRationale: Suggested as Dark Green because the problem appears to involve system-level, justice, nature or regenerative change.
problems.cynefinRationale: Suggested as Confused because evidence confidence is low and the problem needs clarification.

problems.title: Early design carbon lock-in
problems.description: Early design carbon lock-in matters for UrbanRise Developments because reduce embodied carbon and improve community value.
problems.spectrumRationale: Suggested as White because the problem appears to need foundational ownership, evidence or recognition first.
problems.cynefinRationale: Suggested as Clear because cause and effect appear visible enough for structured response.

scoreTrace.formula: weighted positive factors minus effort penalty, divided by five

contributions.explanation: Impact is very high and carries weight 20.
Strategic is very high and carries weight 15.
Leverage is very high and carries weight 15.
Urgency is high and carries weight 10.
Influence is very high and carries weight 10.
Readiness is moderate and carries weight 10.
Confidence is moderate and carries weight 10.
Stakeholder is high and carries weight 5.
Learning is moderate and carries weight 5.
Effort is moderate and is treated as a delivery penalty.

problems.title: Cloud impact evidence
problems.description: Cloud impact evidence matters for CloudSpring Technologies because understand environmental impact of digital products.
problems.spectrumRationale: Suggested as White because the problem appears to need foundational ownership, evidence or recognition first.
problems.cynefinRationale: Suggested as Complicated because expert analysis could reduce uncertainty.

scoreTrace.formula: weighted positive factors minus effort penalty, divided by five

contributions.explanation: Impact is very high and carries weight 20.
Strategic is very high and carries weight 15.
Leverage is very high and carries weight 15.
Urgency is high and carries weight 10.
Influence is moderate and carries weight 10.
Readiness is low and carries weight 10.
Confidence is very low and carries weight 10.
Stakeholder is moderate and carries weight 5.
Learning is moderate and carries weight 5.
Effort is moderate and is treated as a delivery penalty.
